methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Robotics & Manufacturing (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Robotics & Manufacturing, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Blitzpanel is a pre-seed stage robotics and manufacturing company operating within a sector comprising 1 public comparable (277810.KQ) and 8 private peers, including 1X Technologies, Divergent, Exotec, Locus Robotics, and Bedrock Robotics.

Standard peer-median valuation methodology is not applicable to this analysis. The robotics and manufacturing sector contains 11 same-sector peers overall, but filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier companies yielded fewer than three datapoints in each narrow cohort. Relying on all-sector medians would introduce unacceptable basis risk given the heterogeneity of business models, capital intensity, and development timelines across robotics subsegments.

The absence of a sufficiently dense comparable set at the pre-seed stage limits the ability to triangulate valuation via conventional multiples. Any valuation recommendation would rest on alternative methods such as venture capital method frameworks, discounted cash flow analysis (if revenue or clear unit economics exist), or guidance from recent pre-seed rounds in adjacent robotics verticals. Without disclosed funding history or current financials for Blitzpanel, and given the sparsity of pre-seed stage peers in this sector, a meaningful valuation range cannot be derived from the available data. Further due diligence on the company's technical differentiation, founding team background, and near-term milestones would be necessary to support a defensible valuation estimate.
